invest_recommendation_example.summary: Aegis Protocol presents a solid implementation of zero-knowledge circuits addressing a critical need for privacy-preserving compliance. The github activity shows seasoned cryptographic contributions.
strengths: Clear target market addressing regulatory compliance
Active github repository with zero copy-paste boilerplate
weaknesses: High dependency on gas optimization for zk-SNARK verifiers
Intense competition in the ZK space

pass_recommendation_example.summary: Doggoswap shows extremely high scam probability. The code is an exact clone of Uniswap v2 with zero modified parameters besides the token name. Marketing material is highly speculative and lacks depth.
weaknesses: Copied codebase with no original tech
Anon team with a history of abandoned projects
risks: High probability of rug pull or immediate exit
No utility for the proposed governance token
